title: Fleet Expansion
description: Building more caravans expands capacity along a route for moving goods. More caravans mean more goods can be traded per turn, increasing potential profits but also operational costs.
definition-of-done: Caravan purchase system. More caravans increase route capacity. Operational costs scale with fleet size. Fleet management UI.
testing-plan: Verify caravan purchase works. Test capacity increase with more caravans. Verify cost scaling. Test fleet management UI.
todos: Create capacity scaling with fleet size
